title: Uruguayan Beef Skewers with Chimichurri
description: A classic Uruguayan dish featuring tender beef skewers served with a tangy and herby chimichurri sauce.
instructions: Soak 20 bamboo skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, salt, parsley, oregano, garlic, and red pepper flakes.
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the beef strips onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the beef skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
While the beef is cooking, prepare the chimichurri sauce by combining parsley, oregano, garlic, red pepper flakes, red wine vinegar, and matcha powder (if using) in a bowl.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the grilled beef skewers with the chimichurri sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
